languages.text: "Договор с культистами Хаоса — это не какие-то там гонки! Теодора фон Валанциус была созидателем. Она создавала из разрухи порядок, не наоборот".

traits.locale_text: "Договор с культистами Хаоса — это не какие-то там гонки! Теодора фон Валанциус была созидателем. Она создавала из разрухи порядок, не наоборот".
traits.speaker: AbelardCompanion

languages.text: "Striking a deal with Chaos cultists is not some silly race! Theodora von Valancius was a creator. She brought order to devastation — not the other way round."
languages.original_text: "Договор с культистами Хаоса — это не какие-то там гонки! Теодора фон Валанциус была созидателем. Она создавала из разрухи порядок, не наоборот".

traits.locale_text: "Striking a deal with Chaos cultists is not some silly race! Theodora von Valancius was a creator. She brought order to devastation and not the other way round."

traits.locale_text: "Striking a deal with Chaos cultists is not some silly race! Theodora von Valancius was a creator. She brought order to devastation — not the other way round."

languages.text: "Mit Chaoskultisten zu paktieren ist keine dumme Ethnie! Theodora von Valancius war eine Schöpferin. Sie hat Ordnung in die Verwüstung gebracht — nicht andersherum."
languages.original_text: "Striking a deal with Chaos cultists is not some silly race! Theodora von Valancius was a creator. She brought order to devastation — not the other way round."

traits.locale_text: "Mit Chaoskultisten zu paktieren ist keine dumme Ethnie! Theodora von Valancius war eine Schöpferin. Sie hat Ordnung in die Verwüstung gebracht — nicht andersherum."

languages.text: "Passer un accord avec les sectateurs du Chaos n'est pas une course stupide ! Theodora von Valancius était une créatrice. Elle a mis de l'ordre dans la dévastation, et non l'inverse."
languages.original_text: "Striking a deal with Chaos cultists is not some silly race! Theodora von Valancius was a creator. She brought order to devastation — not the other way round."

traits.locale_text: "Passer un accord avec les sectateurs du Chaos n'est pas une course stupide ! Theodora von Valancius était une créatrice. Elle a mis de l'ordre dans la dévastation, et non l'inverse."

languages.text: ¡"Llegar a un acuerdo con los cultistas del Caos" no es una tontería! Theodora von Valancius fue una creadora. Puso orden en la devastación, no al revés".
languages.original_text: "Striking a deal with Chaos cultists is not some silly race! Theodora von Valancius was a creator. She brought order to devastation — not the other way round."

traits.locale_text: ¡"Llegar a un acuerdo con los cultistas del Caos" no es una tontería! Theodora von Valancius fue una creadora. Puso orden en la devastación, no al revés".

languages.text: "Kaos tarikatçılarıyla anlaşma yapmak aptalca bir yarış değildir! Theodora von Valancius bir yaratıcıydı. Yıkıma düzen getirdi — tam tersi değil."
languages.original_text: "Striking a deal with Chaos cultists is not some silly race! Theodora von Valancius was a creator. She brought order to devastation — not the other way round."

traits.locale_text: "Kaos tarikatçılarıyla anlaşma yapmak aptalca bir yarış değildir! Theodora von Valancius bir yaratıcıydı. Yıkıma düzen getirdi — tam tersi değil."
